fault_hypothesis: On line 56, when the counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of `cap`, causing the counter to be clamped one below the intended ceiling.

constraints.intent: After clamping, the counter must equal cap exactly, not cap-1.
At the end of the clamping branch, the counter value must equal cap.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters__1[key__1] <= cap

constraints.intent: After any assignment to counters[key], the value must not exceed cap.
The returned counter value must never exceed the cap.
